patient.summary: High-support patient record with two active monitored issues.

conditions.label: Cardiac rhythm review
conditions.shortDescription: Short irregular rhythm episodes noted during transfer windows.
conditions.detailedNotes: Keep transfer strain low and document symptom timing with any rhythm irregularity reports.
conditions.recommendedSupport: Head-elevated rest and assisted low-exertion transfers.

conditions.label: Respiratory watch
conditions.shortDescription: Breathing becomes shallow after short exertion windows.
conditions.detailedNotes: Encourage paced recovery and avoid clustering exertion-heavy tasks in the same round.
conditions.monitoring: Spot oxygen checks after mobility and evening rounds.
